rationale: The cited paper appears as a single grouped "e.g." reference when the authors justify using an adstock control for advertising carryover. In the citing paper, this functions as a generic methodological precedent rather than a paper-specific building block. The citing study does not develop hypotheses from it, directly reuse its focal constructs, or position its contribution as extending/refining that work. Therefore the citation is best treated as a passing methodological mention.
